result: If I could change the world in one way, I’d eliminate extreme poverty—ensuring that everyone has reliable access to nutritious food, clean water, basic health care, and education, so that no one has to struggle for the necessities that make a dignified life possible.

message.content: If I could change the world in one way, I’d eliminate extreme poverty—ensuring that everyone has reliable access to nutritious food, clean water, basic health care, and education, so that no one has to struggle for the necessities that make a dignified life possible.
